content: SmallWebRTC/aiortc limitations: without TURN, UDP-blocked networks (hotel/corp Wi-Fi) fail media entirely — browsers' TCP fallback requires TURN/TCP which SmallWebRTC lacks by default. aiortc selects all interface addresses as host candidates (private IPs in Fargate). Known regressions: choppy/robotic audio reported in some pipecat versions (v0.0.62 report); data-channel MTU stalls fixed via PIPECAT_SCTP_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE~1100. Pin pipecat version and regression-test audio quality on upgrade.
